reasoning: Approve refund as an exception. Although the order is marked Shipped/Complete, there is no delivery confirmation shown and the customer claims non-delivery. Customer is VIP (42 orders, $6,200 LTV, only 2 prior refunds). Internal notes confirm the customer contacted us at day 32 and our delayed response caused the policy breach. To retain the relationship and due to our delay, approve full refund of $152.15.
